name_en: 🆕N40750 Blue Check! This damiericious piece reinterprets damervicetine canvas with a charming pastel style. A small wallet featuring a round cover with a snap closure and a gold-plated engraved clasp, updating a fresh and feminine atmosphere. It has an interior pocket for bills and coins and 6 card slots. 12x9.5 x1.5 cm.
